mapper.select:
SELECT rnum,productNo,title,CASE TYPE when 'sale' then '판매' when 'share' then '나눔' END AS TYPE , price,content,location,writer,hitCnt,reportCnt,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM ( SELECT productNo,title,TYPE , price,content,location,writer,hitCnt,reportCnt,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY productNo DESC) AS rnum FROM product WHERE 1=1
) R WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY productNo DESC
SELECT productNo,title,type , price,content,location,writer,hitCnt,reportCnt,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM product where productNo=#{productNo}

SELECT rnum,busiNo,busiNum,writer,ownerName,busiTel,busiName,busiType1,busiType2,busiType3 ,storeTel,storeAddr,storeAddrDetail,agreeYn ,CASE state when 'Y' then '입점완료' when 'S' then '입점대기' when 'N' then '반려 및 재검수 요청' END AS state ,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM (SELECT busiNo,busiNum,writer,ownerName,busiTel,busiName,busiType1,busiType2,busiType3 ,storeTel,storeAddr,storeAddrDetail,agreeYn,state,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY busiNo DESC ) AS rnum FROM busi WHERE 1=1
)R WHERE 1=1 AND rnum BETWEEN 1 AND 5 AND deleteYn ='N' ORDER BY busiNo DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE busi SET state=#{state}, modDate =now() WHERE busiNo =#{busiNo}
mapper.select: SELECT busiFileNo,busiNo,busiOriginFileName,busiStoredFileName,busiFileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM busifile WHERE busiNo=#{busiNo} AND deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,busiNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM storeFile where busiNo=#{busiNo} AND deleteYn='N'
